title: Five interdisciplinary tensions and opportunities in neurodiversity research.
author_string: Layinka, Olujolagbe, Hargitai, Luca D, Shah, Punit, Waldren, Lucy H, Leung, Florence Y N
abstract: Improving our understanding of autism, ADHD, dyslexia and other neurodevelopmental conditions requires collaborations between genetics, psychiatry, the social sciences and other fields of research.
